expectations.text: Output file exists at the specified outputs/research.md path
expectations.evidence: File exists and contains 267 lines of research output

expectations.text: Document describes the signal protocol (spectrum-continue, spectrum-retry, spectrum-blocked, promise COMPLETE)
expectations.evidence: Section '4. Signal Protocol' with table listing all 5 signals: Complete (<promise>COMPLETE</promise>), Continue (<spectrum-continue>), Retry (<spectrum-retry>), Blocked (<spectrum-blocked>), Error (<spectrum-error>) with tags, Go constants, and purposes

expectations.text: Document describes stories.json state management and story status tracking
expectations.evidence: Section '5. stories.json Schema' describes the full schema including epic object and stories array with status field ('pending', 'in_progress', 'complete'), blockedBy, files, steps, and context fields

Pattern 'Fresh Context Pattern': 'The core design principle is that each iteration runs in a completely fresh Claude session. Memory persists exclusively through files: stories.json (story status), progress.md (accumulated learnings), and git commits (code changes).'

expectations.text: Document references spectrum.sh script with file:line references
Document references prism-spectrum SKILL.md with file:line references
expectations.evidence: Multiple references: 'skills/prism-spectrum/SKILL.md:1-407', 'SKILL.md:12-18' (philosophy), 'SKILL.md:36-49' (Load State), 'SKILL.md:51-62' (Epic Context), 'SKILL.md:91-104' (Pick Next Story), 'SKILL.md:134-157' (Quality Gates), 'SKILL.md:231-258' (Signal Continuation)

expectations.text: Document does NOT contain improvement suggestions or critiques
expectations.evidence: No improvement suggestions or critiques found. Document is purely descriptive.

expectations.text: Mentioned files (spectrum.sh, SKILL.md) were read before agents were spawned
